level.setting: An ancient, crumbling civilization resting on the ocean floor.

pickup.name: Magma Core
pickup.effect: Grants heat-based damage to geomancy abilities.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the eel collapses a pillar, opening the pathway to the Thermal Vents.

pickup.name: Gravity Rune
pickup.effect: Allows the player to crush objects with increased force.

encounters.trigger: Extracting the Golem's heart powers the Ancient Seal, unlocking the boss arena.

pickup.name: Void Anchor
pickup.effect: Stabilizes the player against psychic interference.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the construct reveals the path to the Leviathan's Lair.

boss.name: Leviathan of the Deep
boss.victory_condition: Anchor the beast to the trench floor to collapse the breach.

level.objective: Seal the breach to the outer ocean floor.

pickup.name: Bubble Shield
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to pressurized water currents.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the jellyfish reveals a passage to the Sunken Ruins.

pickup.name: Ancient Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Emits a harmonic resonance that calms sea creatures.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct unlocks the entrance to the Abyssal Throne.

pickup.name: Tidal Pearl
pickup.effect: Increases health regeneration.

encounters.trigger: Calming the eel allows safe passage to the Boss Arena.

boss.name: Abyssal Leviathan
boss.victory_condition: Use the Tidal Pearl to pacify the leviathan's rage.

level.objective: Restore harmony to the silent reef.

level.setting: A decaying, lightless underwater temple at the bottom of the Mariana Trench.

encounters.hazard: High pressure current crushing health over time.

pickup.name: Essence of Void
pickup.effect: Increases spell penetration against spectral targets.

encounters.trigger: Opening the gate reveals the path to the Bioluminescent Grotto.

pickup.name: Abyssal Pearl
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to dark magic.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Siren triggers the collapse of the ceiling, exposing the Abyssal Throne.

encounters.hazard: Spiky barnacle clusters dealing bleed damage.

pickup.name: Heart of the Depths
pickup.effect: Unlocks the ability to command leviathans.

encounters.trigger: The Revenant's death shatters the seal on the final chamber door.

boss.name: Leviathan King
boss.victory_condition: Use the heart to bind the King's soul and drain his life force.

level.objective: Resurrect the Ancient Kraken to reclaim the throne.
level.reward: The Scepter of the Tide Lord

level.setting: The decaying ruins of an oceanic research laboratory.

pickup.name: Thermal Core
pickup.effect: Grants heat-seeking properties to current attacks.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers a nearby pressure valve release.

pickup.name: Superconductor Rod
pickup.effect: Amplifies electrical current output.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the stalker disturbs the seabed, revealing the path to the inner sanctum.

pickup.name: Ancient Power Cell
pickup.effect: Highly reactive to static electricity.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the eel overloads the reactor, summoning the boss.

boss.name: Leviathan Prime
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Ancient Power Cell within the Leviathan's core.

level.objective: Deactivate the ancient underwater reactor before it causes a global tectonic collapse.
level.reward: The ability to manipulate atmospheric pressure.

level.setting: A crumbling research station resting on the edge of a midnight zone trench.

pickup.name: Thermal Battery
pickup.effect: Charges the environment with heat.

encounters.trigger: Opening the archives triggers a seismic shift that opens the path to the laboratory.

encounters.hazard: Exposed electrical wiring in the flooded floor.

pickup.name: Ancient Override Key
pickup.effect: Disables the central containment field.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the automaton disables the security gate leading to the command core.

encounters.hazard: Rapid current changes pushing the player against debris.

pickup.name: Abyssal Essence
pickup.effect: Increases shadow blade agility.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the guard triggers the core stabilization sequence for the boss fight.

boss.name: Leviathan Echo
boss.victory_condition: Channel the essence into the core while the boss is stunned.

level.objective: Restore the oxygen filters of the ruined facility.
level.reward: The Heart of the Ocean Amulet

level.setting: A decaying, flooded research facility on the ocean floor.

pickup.name: Thermal Flare
pickup.effect: Increases heat generation of pyromancy spells.

encounters.trigger: Burning the kelp blocking the primary airlock.

pickup.name: Magma Core
pickup.effect: Allows the player to melt metal barriers.

encounters.trigger: Igniting the oxygen canisters to blast open the bulkhead door.

pickup.name: Ancient Sunstone
pickup.effect: Essential component to weaken the Boss's shielding.

encounters.trigger: Overloading the core to draw out the guardian.

boss.name: Leviathan of the Depths
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sunstone to shatter the Leviathan's protective outer hide before burning its exposed heart.

level.objective: Deactivate the underwater instability engine before the base implodes.

level.setting: Desolate, sunken research station at the bottom of the Mariana Trench.

encounters.hazard: High-pressure water jets leaking from damaged pipes.

pickup.name: Super-Heated Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Increases damage against icy entities.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab shatters the bulkhead, revealing the rusted pipes leading to the Reactor Core.

pickup.name: Sonic Resonator Module
pickup.effect: Disturbs structural integrity of crystalline bosses.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the swarm activates the emergency elevator to the Observation Deck.

encounters.hazard: Crumbling glass floor with plummeting vision.

pickup.name: Ancient Void Key
pickup.effect: Disables the boss's impenetrable shield.

encounters.trigger: Victory forces the deck control console to unlock the Captain's Quarters.

boss.name: Leviathan Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Use the key to drop the shield then strike the glowing eye.

level.objective: Retrieve the black box from the wreckage of the deep-sea research vessel.
level.reward: The Chronos Shard, capable of manipulating local currents.

encounters.hazard: Slippery seaweed patches that slow movement.

pickup.name: Mirror Prism
pickup.effect: Reflects illusions to reveal hidden pathways.

encounters.trigger: Approaching the crab causes it to burst into melodic laughter, signaling the path to the sunken library.

encounters.hazard: Floating scrolls that block line of sight.

pickup.name: Golden Inkpot
pickup.effect: Enhances spell casting range.

encounters.trigger: The fish releases a cloud of ink that forms a riddle, revealing the location of the boss.

encounters.hazard: Sonic bubbles that push the player back.

pickup.name: Enchanted Baton
pickup.effect: Stuns enemies with musical resonance.

encounters.trigger: The jellyfish hits a wrong note, shattering the final seal on the boss chamber.

boss.name: Tone-Deaf Kraken
boss.victory_condition: Conduct the symphony using the baton to harmonize the Kraken into a peaceful slumber.

level.objective: Restore harmony to the underwater concert hall by defeating the Tone-Deaf Kraken.

pickup.name: Fire Essence
pickup.effect: Imbues attacks with burning damage.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker triggers the vines to retract, revealing the temple entrance.

pickup.name: Ancient Signal Horn
pickup.effect: Summons lightning strikes.

encounters.trigger: The Brute's collapse breaks the dam, flushing the player toward the inner sanctum.

pickup.name: Sun-Core Relic
pickup.effect: Shields against holy fire.

encounters.trigger: Downing the flyer causes it to crash into the main gate, exposing the Boss.

boss.name: Primal Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sun-Core Relic to extinguish the Guardian's flame aura before landing the final strike.

level.objective: Topple the jungle tyrant before the storm consumes the forest.

level.setting: A forgotten, misty jungle dense with ancient, bioluminescent flora.

pickup.name: Sun-Etched Amulet
pickup.effect: Emits a blinding light that confuses shadow-based entities.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker reveals a hidden switch that unlocks the inner sanctum gate.

pickup.name: Obsidian Blade
pickup.effect: Sharp relic that pierces through ethereal barriers.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Guardian reveals an ancient scroll detailing the boss's ritual pattern.

encounters.hazard: Moving vines that constrict player movement.

pickup.name: Spirit Essence
pickup.effect: Vial containing purified jungle energy.

encounters.trigger: Banishing the Jaguar stabilizes the rift, allowing passage to the boss arena.

boss.name: Shadow Serpent
boss.victory_condition: Use the Spirit Essence to break the serpent's shell then finish with the Longbow.

level.objective: Cleanse the corruption from the heart of the jungle.
level.reward: The Heart of the Jungle, granting dominion over nature.

pickup.name: Alchemist's Fire
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to vegetation and wooden shields

encounters.trigger: The Stalker's death alarm activates a pressure plate opening the inner jungle path.

pickup.name: Ancient Sun Amulet
pickup.effect: Blinds creatures sensitive to intense light

encounters.trigger: Defeating the guard triggers a vine trap that catapults the player to the boss lair.

pickup.name: Obsidian Blade Oil
pickup.effect: Doubles damage against hardened scales

encounters.trigger: Slaying the serpent forces the boss from the dark cavern depths.

boss.name: The Root Horror
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sun Amulet to reveal the core, then strike with the Obsidian Dagger.

level.objective: Retrieve the Jade Heart from the temple center.
level.reward: The Jade Heart and the title of Jungle Warden

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Nectar
pickup.effect: Restores 10 health and grants temporary fire resistance.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the snake causes a nearby vine to retract, revealing a hidden path.

encounters.hazard: Slippery lily pads that reduce movement speed.

pickup.name: Primal Totem
pickup.effect: Doubles the strength of the next physical attack.

encounters.trigger: The golem's defeat drops a heavy stone key into the pond.

encounters.hazard: Rapid current pushing the player backward.

pickup.name: Ancient Sunstone
pickup.effect: Emits a blinding light that stuns enemies.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the spirit clears the waterfall to expose the boss lair.

boss.name: Verdant Elder Dragon
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sunstone to stun the dragon, then land the final strike.

level.objective: Restore the Guardian Statue by collecting the three artifacts.

encounters.hazard: Thick, suffocating fog that drains sanity.

pickup.name: Ethereal Essence Vial
pickup.effect: Allows the player to command fallen spirits.

encounters.trigger: Slaughtering the beast reveals the path to the Sunken Altar.

encounters.hazard: Rising quicksand pits that reduce mobility.

pickup.name: Bone-Binding Talisman
pickup.effect: Greatly increases defense against construct damage.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the spirit triggers the ritual awakening of the Ancient Guardian.

encounters.hazard: Thorny vines that strike at nearby movement.

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Relic
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to undead gods.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Treant collapses the cathedral, exposing the Boss Chamber.

boss.name: Xylos, The Necrotic Monarch
boss.victory_condition: Purify the roots of the world tree.

level.objective: Exorcise the darkness from the jungle heart.
level.reward: The ability to resurrect ancient heroes as permanent companions.

level.setting: An enchanted, color-shifting rainforest where plants hum melodies.

pickup.name: Alchemical Solvent Flask
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to vine-based lifeforms

encounters.trigger: Defeating the snake releases a swarm of pollen that reveals the hidden path to the Crystal Pond.

pickup.name: Sonic Resonator
pickup.effect: Shatters crystalline structures and enemies

encounters.trigger: The frog pops into mist, condensing into a glowing key that opens the Ancient Totem Gate.

pickup.name: Refined Essence of Harmony
pickup.effect: Softens hardened surfaces and negates petrification

encounters.trigger: The Golem crumbles, revealing the path to the inner heart of the jungle where the boss awaits.

boss.name: Bloom-Queen of Chaos
boss.victory_condition: Apply the essence to the Queen to calm her frantic growth.

level.objective: Purify the Heart of the Jungle.
level.reward: The Golden Watering Can of Life.

level.setting: A decaying, ancient jungle filled with bioluminescent flora and distorted time rifts.

encounters.hazard: Toxic spore clouds that drain health over time.

pickup.name: Stasis Vial
pickup.effect: Freezes organic matter for five seconds.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel opens the sealed stone gate to the inner canopy.

encounters.hazard: Dread echoes that increase movement speed but lower defense.

pickup.name: Chronos Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the altar’s core mechanism.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the shadow creeper causes the ancient vines to retract, revealing the path to the altar.

encounters.hazard: Shifting floor tiles that reset player position.

pickup.name: Essence of Eternity
pickup.effect: Increases spell casting speed.

encounters.trigger: The panther's collapse activates the final time-distortion field leading to the boss chamber.

boss.name: Primeval Chronovore
boss.victory_condition: Infuse the boss with the Essence of Eternity to stabilize the jungle's timeline.

level.objective: Retrieve the Heart of Time from the jungle's center before the timeline collapses.
level.reward: The Chronomancer's Mantle which allows for short-range teleportation.

level.setting: An abandoned, mist-choked jungle filled with crumbling stone architecture.

pickup.name: Jagged Obsidian Shard
pickup.effect: Increases bleed damage on enemies by 50 percent.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Stalker reveals a hidden lever that opens the ancient shrine gate.

pickup.name: Essence of the Ancient Sun
pickup.effect: Allows the player to bypass boss armor plating.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Guardian forces the central monolith to descend into the floor.

pickup.name: Titan's Adrenaline Vial
pickup.effect: Grants temporary invulnerability and double attack speed.

encounters.trigger: The Jaguar's spirit coalesces into a key that unlocks the inner sanctum.

boss.name: The Ancient Idol of Decay
boss.victory_condition: Strike the Idol's core with the Essence applied during a Berserker Rage phase.

level.objective: Purge the corruption from the heart of the jungle by destroying the Ancient Idol.
level.reward: The Heart of the Jungle Amulet
